base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their fifties, of South Asian descent, with straight blonde hair and amber eyes, a soft smile. diffuse cloudy-day lighting. a plain off-white wall. lookalikes.prompt: A woman in her late 40s with warm olive skin, a few subtle fine lines around her eyes, and a small beauty mark above her lip, rides a bicycle on a sunlit city street. Her face is a soft heart shape with a gently sculpted jawline. Her hair is light brown, wavy, styled in a side part, and falls just past her shoulders, with a slightly lower hairline than average. Her round, dark brown eyes are set close together, beneath thin, lightly arched eyebrows. Her nose is slender with a subtle upward curve at the tip, and her lips are full with a natural, understated pout, forming a soft, relaxed expression. She is wearing casual clothing, and her head is turned slightly to the left, looking directly at the camera. Full-body shot. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
